columns.name: DATE
columns.context: Calendar date of the weekly revenue snapshot (week ending). Primary time grain for executive revenue trend and forecast comparison.

columns.name: FISCAL_YEAR
columns.context: Fiscal year the snapshot belongs to, for year-over-year executive reporting.

columns.name: QUARTER
columns.context: Fiscal quarter label (e.g. Q3) used to group revenue for quarterly business reviews.

columns.name: FISCAL_PERIOD
columns.context: Fiscal period / month bucket within the quarter for period-level revenue analysis.

columns.name: TENANT_ID
columns.context: Governed tenant identifier that scopes the row for multi-tenant row-level security.

columns.name: REGION
columns.context: Sales region the revenue is attributed to (West, East, Central, South).

columns.name: SEGMENT
columns.context: Customer segment (Enterprise, Mid-Market, SMB) for segment-level revenue mix.

columns.name: NET_REVENUE
columns.context: Net recognized revenue for the segment/region on the snapshot date, after discounts and credits.

columns.name: GROSS_MARGIN
columns.context: Gross margin dollars for the revenue in the row, used for profitability views.

columns.name: EXPANSION_ARR
columns.context: Expansion ARR added from upsell/cross-sell within the period.

columns.name: CHURNED_ARR
columns.context: ARR lost to churn/downgrade within the period.

columns.name: REVENUE_AT_RISK
columns.context: Probability-weighted revenue at risk of churn for the segment/region — the executive headline risk metric.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_ID
columns.context: Unique account identifier (primary key) joining renewal risk to the account dimension.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_NAME
columns.context: Customer account display name shown in renewal and retention views.

columns.name: TENANT_ID
columns.context: Governed tenant identifier used for row-level security scoping.

columns.name: REGION
columns.context: Sales region the account belongs to.

columns.name: SEGMENT
columns.context: Customer segment classification (Enterprise, Mid-Market, SMB).

columns.name: INDUSTRY
columns.context: Account industry vertical for cohort and benchmark analysis.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_OWNER_ID
columns.context: Identifier of the owning account executive / CSM.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_OWNER_NAME
columns.context: Name of the owning account executive / CSM responsible for the renewal.

columns.name: ANNUAL_RECURRING_REVENUE
columns.context: Account annual recurring revenue (ARR) — the renewal value exposure.

columns.name: RENEWAL_DATE
columns.context: Contract renewal date driving the renewal-risk time horizon.

columns.name: RENEWAL_RISK_SCORE
columns.context: Model renewal-risk score (0-100); higher means greater churn risk.

columns.name: RISK_TIER
columns.context: Categorical risk tier (Low, Medium, High, Critical) derived from the risk score.

columns.name: TOP_RISK_DRIVER
columns.context: Primary explanatory driver of the renewal risk (e.g. SLA breaches, usage drop, negative sentiment).

columns.name: PREDICTED_CHURN_PROBABILITY
columns.context: Model-predicted probability the account churns at renewal.

columns.name: REVENUE_AT_RISK
columns.context: Probability-weighted ARR at risk for the account (ARR x churn probability).

columns.name: RECOMMENDED_ACTION
columns.context: Governed recommended retention play for the account.

columns.name: CASES_90D
columns.context: Count of support cases opened in the trailing 90 days.

columns.name: SLA_BREACHES_90D
columns.context: Count of SLA breaches in the trailing 90 days — a leading churn indicator.

columns.name: NEGATIVE_CASES_90D
columns.context: Count of support cases with negative sentiment in the trailing 90 days.

columns.name: AVG_USAGE_SCORE_90D
columns.context: Average product usage/health score over the trailing 90 days.

columns.name: USAGE_DROP_DAYS_90D
columns.context: Number of days in the trailing 90 with a material usage drop.

columns.name: INCIDENT_ID
columns.context: Unique reliability incident identifier (primary key).

columns.name: INCIDENT_DATE
columns.context: Date the incident was declared.

columns.name: PRODUCT_ID
columns.context: Identifier of the affected product/service.

columns.name: REGION
columns.context: Region most affected by the incident.

columns.name: SEVERITY
columns.context: Incident severity level (e.g. SEV1-SEV4).

columns.name: INCIDENT_CATEGORY
columns.context: Classification of the incident (e.g. availability, performance, data).

columns.name: ROOT_CAUSE
columns.context: Root cause summary from the post-incident review.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_IMPACT_LEVEL
columns.context: Assessed level of customer impact for the incident.

columns.name: ESTIMATED_REVENUE_IMPACT
columns.context: Estimated revenue impact attributed to the incident.

columns.name: AFFECTED_ACCOUNT_COUNT
columns.context: Distinct number of accounts affected by the incident.

columns.name: SUPPORT_CASE_COUNT
columns.context: Number of support cases linked to the incident.

columns.name: SLA_BREACH_COUNT
columns.context: Number of SLA breaches tied to the incident.

columns.name: NEGATIVE_CASE_COUNT
columns.context: Number of negative-sentiment cases tied to the incident.

columns.name: RENEWAL_REVENUE_AT_RISK
columns.context: Renewal revenue at risk across accounts affected by the incident.

columns.name: ACTION_ID
columns.context: Unique identifier for the agent-proposed action (primary key).

columns.name: CREATED_TS
columns.context: Timestamp the action was proposed by the agent.

columns.name: DATE
columns.context: Business date the action belongs to.

columns.name: TENANT_ID
columns.context: Governed tenant identifier for row-level security scoping.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_ID
columns.context: Account the action targets.

columns.name: REGION
columns.context: Region of the target account.

columns.name: SEGMENT
columns.context: Segment of the target account.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_OWNER_ID
columns.context: Owner (AE/CSM) responsible for the account.

columns.name: SOURCE_AGENT
columns.context: Name of the Cortex agent that proposed the action.

columns.name: SOURCE_QUESTION
columns.context: The natural-language question that produced the recommendation.

columns.name: RECOMMENDATION
columns.context: The proposed retention/save recommendation text.

columns.name: APPROVAL_STATUS
columns.context: Human approval status (Proposed, Approved, Rejected) from the governed Task Center.

columns.name: EXECUTION_STATUS
columns.context: Execution status of the approved action (Pending, Executed, Voided).

columns.name: WORKFLOW_NAME
columns.context: Name of the Domo workflow that governs execution.

columns.name: APPROVED_BY
columns.context: Identity of the approver who actioned the item.

columns.name: COMPLETED_TS
columns.context: Timestamp the action reached a terminal state.

columns.name: EXPECTED_REVENUE_PROTECTED
columns.context: Expected revenue protected if the action succeeds.

columns.name: ACTUAL_REVENUE_PROTECTED
columns.context: Actual revenue protected after execution.

columns.name: WORKFLOW_CYCLE_DAYS
columns.context: Days from proposal to completion — approval cycle time.

columns.name: USER_KEY
columns.context: Unique key for the portal user (primary key).

columns.name: DISPLAY_NAME
columns.context: Display name of the portal user.

columns.name: PERSONA
columns.context: Governed persona (e.g. Executive Sponsor, Regional VP) driving default scope.

columns.name: TENANT_ID
columns.context: Tenant the user belongs to, for multi-tenant isolation.

columns.name: REGION
columns.context: Region the user is entitled to see (row-level security).

columns.name: ACCOUNT_OWNER_ID
columns.context: Account-owner scope granted to the user.

columns.name: ACCESS_LEVEL
columns.context: Entitlement/access level controlling data visibility.
